division.name: Hood System Division
division.title: Professional Hood System Solutions
division.subtitle: Engineering & Maintenance
division.description: PRIME Hood System Division delivers comprehensive, engineered solutions for commercial kitchen exhaust systems. From NFPA 96 compliant inspections to complete installations, we ensure your facility operates safely and efficiently.

services.name: Diagnostics & Reports
services.shortDesc: Comprehensive system analysis and compliance reporting for complete hood system documentation.
services.fullDesc: Professional diagnostics provide detailed analysis of your hood system's current condition, performance metrics, and compliance status. We identify potential issues before they become costly problems.

benefits.title: Compliance Documentation
benefits.desc: Comprehensive reports that satisfy regulatory and insurance requirements for hood system maintenance.

benefits.title: Identify Issues Early
benefits.desc: Detect potential problems before they impact operation or create safety hazards.

benefits.title: Data-Driven Insights
benefits.desc: Detailed metrics and recommendations for optimizing system performance and efficiency.

process.title: System Inspection
process.desc: Visual and mechanical inspection of all hood system components and connections.

process.title: Performance Testing
process.desc: Measure airflow, filtration efficiency, and operational parameters.

process.title: Compliance Verification
process.desc: Verify adherence to NFPA 96 standards and local code requirements.

process.title: Report Generation
process.desc: Comprehensive documentation with findings, recommendations, and maintenance plan.

faqs.question: How often should hood systems be diagnosed?
faqs.answer: Professional diagnostics should be performed annually at minimum, and more frequently for high-volume kitchens or systems with history of issues.

faqs.question: What makes your reports NFPA 96 compliant?
faqs.answer: All our technicians hold current NFPA 96 certifications and our reports include complete compliance verification, component assessment, and recommendations aligned with all applicable standards.

services.name: Hood Cleaning Services
services.shortDesc: Deep cleaning and degreasing for complete hood system maintenance and fire safety compliance.
services.fullDesc: Professional hood cleaning services ensure your exhaust system operates at peak efficiency. Our expert technicians provide comprehensive degreasing that meets all NFPA 96 standards.

benefits.title: Fire Safety Compliance
benefits.desc: Regular cleaning reduces fire risk and ensures compliance with all fire codes.

benefits.title: Peak Performance
benefits.desc: Clean systems operate more efficiently, reducing energy costs and equipment wear.

benefits.title: Extended Equipment Life
benefits.desc: Preventive cleaning helps protect your hood system investment for years to come.

process.title: Pre-Inspection
process.desc: Assess current condition and identify any safety concerns or damage.

process.title: Deep Degreasing
process.desc: Professional-grade cleaning removes all grease, residue, and buildup safely.

process.title: Component Service
process.desc: Clean filters, inspect fans, and service all accessible hood system parts.

process.title: Final Inspection
process.desc: Verify cleanliness, operation, and document work completed.

faqs.question: How often should hoods be cleaned?
faqs.answer: The frequency depends on kitchen type and volume. High-volume kitchens may need monthly service, while lower-volume facilities might require quarterly cleaning.

faqs.question: Can you provide after-hours service?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends to minimize impact on kitchen operations.

services.name: Access Panels
services.shortDesc: Installation and maintenance of high-quality access panels for system inspection and cleaning.
services.fullDesc: Quality access panels are essential for proper hood system maintenance and inspection. We provide premium panels that withstand commercial kitchen environments.

benefits.title: Easy Access
benefits.desc: Properly installed access panels make system inspection and cleaning convenient and safe.

benefits.title: Safety Standards
benefits.desc: Our panels meet all commercial kitchen safety requirements and building codes.

benefits.title: Cost Savings
benefits.desc: Reduce labor costs and system damage with accessible, well-designed access points.

process.title: Assessment
process.desc: Evaluate current access points and identify needed improvements.

process.title: Planning
process.desc: Design access solution that meets code requirements and operational needs.

process.title: Installation
process.desc: Professional installation with minimal system disruption.

process.title: Testing
process.desc: Verify functionality, security, and compliance.

faqs.question: What materials are your access panels made from?
faqs.answer: We use high-grade stainless steel and aluminum construction designed to withstand commercial kitchen environments and frequent use.

faqs.question: Do access panels need maintenance?
faqs.answer: Minimal maintenance is required. We recommend periodic inspection and cleaning as part of routine hood system service.

services.name: Emergency Ansul Clean-up
services.shortDesc: Rapid response and complete cleanup services for fire suppression system activation and restoration.
services.fullDesc: When your Ansul system activates, you need immediate professional response. Our emergency cleanup team arrives quickly to restore your kitchen safely.

benefits.title: 24/7 Emergency Response
benefits.desc: Rapid deployment of certified technicians to minimize downtime.

benefits.title: Safe Cleanup
benefits.desc: Proper handling and disposal of all chemicals and residue.

benefits.title: Documentation
benefits.desc: Complete records for insurance and regulatory requirements.

process.title: Immediate Response
process.desc: Rapid assessment and initial safety measures.

process.title: Complete Cleanup
process.desc: Remove all chemical residue, grease, and contaminants.

process.title: System Inspection
process.desc: Verify all equipment is safe and operational.

process.title: Recharge & Documentation
process.desc: Recharge suppression system and provide complete documentation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency response with technicians typically arriving within 60 minutes of notification in our service area.

faqs.question: Does your cleanup include system recharge?
faqs.answer: Yes, complete cleanup and system recharge are included in our emergency service package.

services.name: Duct Cleaning Services
services.shortDesc: Professional ductwork cleaning and inspection for optimal airflow and system efficiency.
services.fullDesc: Clean ducts are critical for system efficiency and safety. Our professional ductwork cleaning removes buildup and ensures optimal airflow.

benefits.title: Improved Airflow
benefits.desc: Clean ducts ensure proper ventilation and system performance.

benefits.title: Energy Efficiency
benefits.desc: Reduce energy consumption with optimized airflow and system operation.

benefits.title: Fire Safety
benefits.desc: Remove grease and debris that could pose fire hazards.

process.title: Inspection
process.desc: Visual and camera inspection of entire ductwork system.

process.title: Cleaning
process.desc: Professional equipment removes all buildup and contaminants.

process.title: Verification
process.desc: Post-cleaning inspection confirms complete removal of debris.

process.title: Documentation
process.desc: Complete records of work performed for compliance.

faqs.question: How often should ducts be cleaned?
faqs.answer: Most commercial kitchens benefit from annual duct cleaning, with high-volume operations requiring quarterly service.

faqs.question: Does duct cleaning affect kitchen operations?
faqs.answer: We can schedule service during closed hours to minimize disruption, or work during operating hours with minimal impact.

services.name: Exhaust System Diagrams
services.shortDesc: Detailed system documentation and blueprints for compliance and operational reference.
services.fullDesc: Complete system documentation is essential for proper maintenance and code compliance. We provide detailed diagrams and blueprints of your hood system.

benefits.title: Regulatory Compliance
benefits.desc: Complete documentation satisfies inspection and insurance requirements.

benefits.title: Maintenance Reference
benefits.desc: Diagrams guide technicians and facility staff through system components.

benefits.title: Planning Tool
benefits.desc: Use diagrams for planning upgrades, repairs, or system modifications.

process.title: Site Survey
process.desc: Comprehensive measurement and documentation of system layout.

process.title: Component Mapping
process.desc: Identify and document all system components and connections.

process.title: Diagram Creation
process.desc: Professional blueprints with detailed annotations and specifications.

process.title: Delivery
process.desc: Provide diagrams in multiple formats for easy reference and filing.

faqs.question: In what formats are diagrams provided?
faqs.answer: We provide diagrams in PDF, AutoCAD, and printed formats for maximum flexibility and accessibility.

faqs.question: Can you update existing diagrams?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. If you've made modifications to your system, we can survey and update your diagrams.

services.name: Variable Frequency Drive
services.shortDesc: Energy-efficient fan speed management for reduced operating costs and equipment longevity.
services.fullDesc: Variable Frequency Drives (VFD) optimize fan speed based on real-time demand, dramatically reducing energy consumption while extending equipment life.

benefits.title: Energy Savings
benefits.desc: Reduce energy consumption by 20-50% through intelligent fan speed management.

benefits.title: Equipment Longevity
benefits.desc: Lower operating speeds reduce wear and extend component life.

benefits.title: Noise Reduction
benefits.desc: Variable speed operation creates a quieter, more comfortable kitchen environment.

process.title: Assessment
process.desc: Analyze current system performance and usage patterns.

process.title: Design
process.desc: Design VFD system optimized for your specific kitchen operations.

process.title: Installation
process.desc: Professional installation and system integration.

process.title: Optimization
process.desc: Fine-tune settings for maximum efficiency and performance.

faqs.question: How much can I save with VFD?
faqs.answer: Most commercial kitchens see energy savings of 20-50%, with typical payback periods of 2-5 years.

faqs.question: Is VFD compatible with existing systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, VFD can be retrofitted to most existing hood systems. We'll assess compatibility during the initial consultation.

products.name: Filters
products.shortDesc: High-efficiency replacement filters for superior grease capture and system performance.
products.fullDesc: Premium replacement filters designed for maximum grease capture and airflow efficiency. Our filters extend hood system life and reduce maintenance costs.

products.name: Belts
products.shortDesc: Durable drive belts designed for consistent fan operation and extended service life.
products.fullDesc: High-quality replacement belts engineered for commercial kitchen exhaust fans. Our belts provide reliable performance under demanding conditions.

products.name: Exhaust Fans
products.shortDesc: Engineered exhaust fans built for commercial kitchen environments with superior airflow.
products.fullDesc: Premium exhaust fans designed specifically for commercial kitchen applications. Our fans deliver consistent airflow and operate reliably in demanding environments.

products.name: Motors
products.shortDesc: High-performance motors built for reliability and efficiency in commercial applications.
products.fullDesc: Industrial-grade motors engineered for continuous operation in commercial kitchen exhaust systems. Tested for durability and consistent performance.

products.name: Fan Blades
products.shortDesc: High-quality replacement fan blades engineered for commercial kitchen exhaust systems.
products.fullDesc: Precision-engineered fan blades designed to deliver optimal airflow and vibration balance. Our blades are manufactured to exacting standards.

products.name: Hinges
products.shortDesc: Heavy-duty stainless steel hinges for access panels and removable system components.
products.fullDesc: Commercial-grade hinges specifically designed for frequent opening and closing. Built to withstand rigorous kitchen environments.

products.name: Grease Cup
products.shortDesc: Convenient grease collection and disposal system for simplified maintenance.
products.fullDesc: Our grease cups make collection and disposal easier. Easy-to-empty design reduces mess and simplifies regular maintenance.

products.name: Pillow Block Bearing
products.shortDesc: Industrial-grade pillow block bearings for smooth fan operation and reduced vibration.
products.fullDesc: Premium pillow block bearings engineered for continuous duty in commercial exhaust systems. Built for smooth, quiet operation.

products.name: Light Fixture
products.shortDesc: Commercial-grade LED lighting designed for hood system inspection and cleaning.
products.fullDesc: Bright, energy-efficient LED fixtures designed for hood system installation. Provides excellent visibility for inspection and maintenance work.
